verdicts.title: ~3.2k LOC of jobs/ background workers wired to no entrypoint
verdicts.note: __main__.py:20-31 imports only retention_backfill/retention_sweeper/usage_rollup; grep over src shows RoutineSchedulerLoop/TodoExtractor/ProposalExtractor/TodoRecurrenceMaterializerLoop/ApprovalExpirySweeper (and build_default_sweeper) have zero non-test callers, while app.py:222 still mounts TodoExtractionsApiRouter over the unfilled table.

verdicts.title: Approval-resume completion skips usage/audit/budget/reconcile/timeout
verdicts.note: approval.py grep shows no _record_run_usage/charge_run/emit_run_completed/_reconcile_inflight/asyncio.timeout; _complete_run_with_result (approval.py:577-628) only appends message + FINAL_RESPONSE + terminate, whereas run.py:545-572 additionally calls emit_run_completed + _record_run_usage (which charges budgets, run.py:720-732) and _stream_runtime wraps timeout at run.py:1302 vs _stream_resume (approval.py:552-575) unwrapped.

verdicts.title: Production worker strictly serial, cancel cannot preempt in-flight run
verdicts.note: run_forever (loop.py:164-170) awaits run_once inline (claims one, loop.py:118-126); concurrent run_until_idle/_claim_batch (loop.py:128-157) have no production callers — both entrypoints (app.py:825, __main__.py:179) call run_forever; streaming_executor.py has no CANCELLING status check and cancel.py:37-58 only flips status.

verdicts.title: Layering inversion: agent_runtime/runtime_api import runtime_worker
verdicts.note: self_fork.py:27 and conversation_fork.py:25 runtime-import runtime_worker.audit.WorkerAuditEmitter; system_skills.py:30 imports BUILTIN_SKILLS_ROOT; tool_budget_guard.py:28 TYPE_CHECKING-imports ToolCallLedger — a real intra-service cycle against the 'agent_runtime = pure domain' split (not the cross-service hard rule, all three live inside services/ai-backend).

verdicts.title: Run vs approval handler duplicated flows held in sync by hand
verdicts.note: _dependencies_for_resume (approval.py:484) docstring says 'Mirrors _dependencies_for_run', both build DraftBackend (run.py:935 / approval.py:527); _workspace_snapshot_emitter and DRAFT_UPDATED payload duplicated; approval.py:311/335/343 call RuntimeRunHandler private classmethods — confirmed, though the emitter is near-identical not literally 'byte-identical' (command.* vs run.*).

verdicts.title: Nine near-identical env_float/env_int/env_bool copies + hand-rolled loops
verdicts.note: grep 'def env_float/env_int/env_bool' returns exactly 9 files (runtime_api_store.py, usage_rollup_loop.py, retention_backfill/routine_scheduler/todo_recurrence_materializer/approval_expiry_sweeper/retention_sweeper jobs, db_statement_metrics.py, refresh_loop.py) plus the tenth _positive_float/_positive_int variant at dependencies.py:182-200.

verdicts.title: Consent-card risk labels from tool-name substring heuristics
verdicts.note: _connector_action_is_read_only (stream_events.py:910-918) checks only create/post/send/update/delete/write, so remove_member/merge_pr/drop_table/execute_query classify read_only=True -> risk_level='low' (817) and reversible=NOT_APPLICABLE (1028) with no readOnlyHint/destructiveHint override; _APPROVAL_IRREVERSIBLE_TOKENS (951-955) has zero references.

verdicts.title: Per-run in-memory state leaks in long-lived worker processes
verdicts.note: StreamOrchestrator is a per-worker singleton (run.py:213), yet discard_ledger (stream_tools.py:109-113) pops only _ledgers/_reasoning_buffers and discard_metrics (stream_subagents.py:83-85) pops only _metrics_by_run — _tool_call_states/_tool_call_ids and the four _subagent_* dicts are never purged, and approval.py:177/408 _resumed_task_ids only grows.

verdicts.title: _validate_capability_mode guard can never raise
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is without deep verification.

verdicts.title: Two parallel bespoke RFC-5545 rrule evaluators + duplicated frozenset
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is without deep verification.
